statement: In every magma, Equation 1192 (`x = y * ((z * (z * w)) * x)`) implies Equation 3952 (`x * y = (y * (x * x)) * y`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0601
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op y (op (op z (op z w)) x))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, (op x y) = (op (op y (op x x)) y)
